name: Fire Shucked Oyster Shooters with Jack's Vermouth Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. Place oysters flat side down on the grill.
3. As the oysters start to open, remove them carefully and place in the ice-cold vermouth marinade.
4. Allow the oysters to cool.
5. Remove the flat part of the shell and cut the mussel loose from its shell, reserving all liquid.
6. Pour 1 teaspoon of the reserved juice over the oysters on the half shell.
7. Garnish with fresh dill.
